zhangming.name: Zhang Ming
zhangming.content: AlphaArena's paper trading feature allowed me to fully test my strategies before investing real money, avoiding unnecessary losses. The AI assistant's suggestions are very valuable.

lihua.name: Li Hua
lihua.content: The AI assistant's advice is very helpful, especially when I need to make quick decisions. It saved me a lot of research time. My returns increased by 30%.

wangfang.name: Wang Fang
wangfang.content: As a learning tool, AlphaArena provides a complete professional trading experience, allowing me to learn by doing. Much more useful than textbooks!
